Translation.Text:
Dolder®- System
Do only use original parts of the Dolder® System produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Dolder® is a registered Trademark.
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.

Ackermann-Bar
Do only use original female parts of the Ackermann-Bar produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.

CM Round Bar
Do only use original female parts of the CM Round bar produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.

M-SG® Star 1 M-SG® Star 2
Do only use original female parts of the M-SG® Star 1, M-SG® Star 2 produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
M-SG® Star 1 and M-SG® Star 2 are registered Trademarks.
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.

Dalbo®- System
Do only use original female parts of the Dalbo® System produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Dalbo® is a registered Trademark.
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/en/dental/products/attachments The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.
